texto: Hope...which is whispered from Pandora's box only after all the other plagues and sorrows had escaped, is the best and last of all things. Without it, there is only time. And time pushes at our backs like a centrifuge, forcing us outward and away, until it nudges us into oblivion.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Ian Caldwell: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Hope...which is whispered from Pandora's box only after all the other plagues and sorrows had esc…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, esperanca, pandora-s-box pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de pandora-s-box e plague.
